evals.name: happy_path_normal
evals.prompt: 解压 C:\Users\gotmo\Code\Code-zip\memorix.7z 到 C:\Users\gotmo\Code 文件夹里
evals.expected_output: Successfully extracts the archive into C:\Users\gotmo\Code\memorix\, runs the inventory chain (scan + backfill + verify), appends one entry to C:\Users\gotmo\Code\Code-zip\extracted.json, and reports the matched inventory entry. For memorix the expected type is upstream-clone and source_star should auto-fill to AVIDS2-memorix.md.

evals.name: bare_name_lookup
evals.expected_output: Should resolve 'memorix' by appending .7z and searching <code-zip>/. Same end state as happy_path_normal. Tests the basename-to-path resolution path used when the user types `memorix` instead of the full path.

evals.name: nested_top_level_folder
evals.prompt: 解压 C:\Users\gotmo\Code\Code-zip\<some-7z-with-nested-folder>.7z （归档内部是 memo/memo/... 嵌套结构）
evals.expected_output: Script detects the doubled top-level via 7z l output (X and X entries), sets project_name=memo, extracts to <code-dir>/memo, then promotes any memo/memo/* up one level so the final tree is <code-dir>/memo/<files>. End result: a single memo/ folder on disk, ledger entry has project_name='memo' (no /memo/memo/ leakage), scan_inventory.py classifies it (likely upstream-clone if origin is third-party).

evals.name: target_already_exists_refuses
evals.prompt: 再次解压 memorix.7z （目标文件夹 C:\Users\gotmo\Code\memorix 已经存在）
evals.expected_output: Script must exit non-zero (code 2 per the SKILL spec). Error message must mention --force as the override. Must NOT overwrite, must NOT touch the ledger. Invariant: c-code-repos.json's memorix entry last_scanned is unchanged.

evals.name: ledger_duplicate_refuses
evals.prompt: 解压 Code-zip 里的 another.7z，然后再跑一次同样的命令（第二次 ledger 已有记录）
evals.expected_output: First run succeeds, writes ledger. Second run exits with code 3 (not 2 — distinct from target-conflict), error message references 'ledger 已记录' and the extracted_at timestamp, and explicitly recommends --force. No new ledger entry written. No new files extracted.

evals.name: multi_top_level_aborts
evals.prompt: 解压一个包含两个无关顶层目录（比如 src\ 和 docs\）的 .7z
evals.expected_output: Script must exit non-zero (code 2) with the '复杂归档：检测到多个顶层条目' error message from detect_project_name. No extraction, no ledger entry, no scan_inventory.py invocation. The error must be clear about which entries were detected (so the user can decide whether to manually extract).

evals.name: sevenzip_missing_aborts
evals.prompt: 在没装 7-Zip 的机器上跑 install_archive.py memorix
evals.expected_output: Script must exit non-zero (code 2) with the '找不到 7-Zip CLI' message. No partial extraction, no broken ledger entry. Error should be actionable (mention the default install path).

evals.name: list_ledger
evals.prompt: 列出 Code-zip/extracted.json 里目前记录的所有归档
evals.expected_output: Runs --list mode and prints a markdown-style table with archive / project_name / extracted_at / inventory_type / source_star columns. Empty ledger prints a friendly '(ledger 是空的)' hint. Exits 0 in both cases.

evals.name: force_re_extract
evals.prompt: memorix 已经被装过，但用户改了源码想从头来一遍：`python install_archive.py memorix --force`
evals.expected_output: With --force: prior ledger entry is removed and replaced with a new one (not appended as duplicate), target directory is wiped and re-extracted (note: 7z -y on an existing dir may merge files — acceptable for v1), scan_inventory.py runs again and updates last_full_scan timestamp in c-code-repos.json's _meta.

evals.name: no_sync_flag
evals.prompt: `python install_archive.py memorix --no-sync`：只想要解压 + ledger，不想被 inventory 链碰到
evals.expected_output: Archive extracts, ledger entry appended. scan_inventory.py is NEVER called. The ledger entry's synced=false and sync_results=null. c-code-repos.json's _meta.last_full_scan timestamp must NOT change.
